title: Create: Enhanced Iron Processing
description: This is a datapack that adds a custom mixing recipe to produce crimsite renewably to enhance your iron and redstone farms.
body:
# Create: Enhanced Iron and Gold
This is a datapack that adds a custom mixing recipe to produce crimsite renewably to enhance your iron and redstone farms.

## Recipes added by this datapack:
### Mixing recipe for Crimsite
Put 1x clay ball, cobblestone and red dye into a heated mixer and you will recieve one crimsite.
 OR 
1x cobblestone 1x clay ball and 50 milibuckets of lava in a normal mixer for 1x crimsite.

### Mixing recipe for Ochrum:
Heated mixer
1x Cobblestone
1x yellow die
1x clay ball
result: 1x ochrum

### Red die
Crafting
1x beetroot
result: 1x red dye

### Leather
Crafting
1x Paper
1x Brown die
